div.h3: NUMA Topology for Kernel-Bypass Packet Processing

p.strong: Intel Xeon Scalable Architecture (Ice Lake/Sapphire Rapids)
p.em: Focus: Non-Uniform Memory Access Latency & DMA Pathing

ul.li: [ ] Configure DPDK socket-mem for Node 0 only.

ol.li: DMA Engine writes to local_ram_0 via pcie_rc_0.
DMA Engine must cross UPI Link.
Writing to local_ram_1 consumes UPI bandwidth.
